name: Ley de Stefan-Boltzmann
description: Calcula la potencia radiada por un cuerpo negro.
seo_description: Calcula la potencia radiada por un cuerpo negro. Gratis, rГЎpida y sin registro.
example_label: Find radiated power from a 2.5 mВІ surface at 500 K with emissivity 0.85.
result_context: The radiated power {power} W is emitted according to the Stefan-Boltzmann law.
formula_display: P = Пѓ Г— Оµ Г— A Г— TГўВЃВґ  where Пѓ = 5.670374Г—10ГўВЃВ»ГўВЃВё W/(mВІГўГўв‚¬В№вЂ¦KГўВЃВґ)
steps: Temperature T = 500 K, ГЎrea A = 2.5 mВІ, emissivity Оµ = 0.85
Multiply: Пѓ Г— Оµ Г— A Г— TГўВЃВґ
P = 5.670374Г—10ГўВЃВ»ГўВЃВё Г— 0.85 Г— 2.5 Г— 6.25Г—10В№ГўВЃВ° ГўГўв‚¬В°Л† 7533.16 W
mistakes: Using Celsius instead of Kelvin (must be absolute temperature)
Wrong power of temperature (must be TвЃґ)
